start.npcText: Oh — a new face. I'm always looking for stories, and you look like you have a few.

responses.text: I just came from the dungeon.

who_are_you.npcText: Sera. I collect stories — battles, strange places, things people would rather forget. I write them down so they aren't lost. This waystation has some good ones.

kind_of_stories.npcText: Dungeons. Monsters. Deals made in the dark. The usual. Bron over there has enough material for three volumes, if I could ever get him talking properly.

dungeon_story.npcText: You made it out of that place? I've been trying to find someone to take me in there for months. Bron won't even hear of it. Tell me everything.

another_time.npcText: Fair enough. I'll hold you to that.

passing_through.npcText: Aren't we all. Safe travels, then.
